Here Are 5 Stops For The Perfect Grilled Cheese SandwichSay Cheese! Here Are 5 Stops For The Perfect Grilled Cheese SandwichVanessa LEat, At Home2 months agoShare Whether it’s café comforts or crafted at home, each destination is a different stop to chase that slow, satisfying cheese pull. Grilled cheese may not be the best to overdo, but it’s a delicious excuse to indulge in a perfectly crisped melt. It’s the simple things that matter, after all, even the ancient Romans started the crunch we’re still chasing. Since then, many cultures have reinterpreted the recipe with their own spin. In France, it’s croque monsieur—grilled ham and cheese sandwich, instead. Whereas in Switzerland, the cheese is melted separately and then scraped onto the bread, not like our usual approach of chucking the loaded sandwich straight onto the grill. Now, this simple classic is everywhere—dressed up with a toasted touch, meats, and greens. Bread-y or not, because it’s never a reason to turn down a molten make. After One KL Café, event space, or your corner of delight, After One KL is the door to them all. Inviting you to the table with a Mediterranean kiss whilst the two-storey space points to a pleasant dining experience ahead. Springing from an ethos of healthy Mediterranean and plant-forward offerings, even the grilled cheese feels just as fulfilling as it is wholesome. The top pick? The Mushroom Cheese Sandwich, where button mushrooms are held together in aged cheddar, mozzarella, and supple gouda. It’s a pretty sticky situation, with sweet potato chips to tuck into alongside tangy tomato soup—a zip of acidity to keep things from tipping into the heavy side. While the menu boasts semi-plant-based food, After One KL isn’t one to stay within convention, as reimagined through their sandwich lineup, with additions like the Hot Roast Beef Sandwich and the Grilled Chicken Sandwich—an easy fit for a cheesy day. IG: @afterone.kl La Spiga D’Oro Who knew that a homesick ache could build an Italian comfort stack like this? Best embodied in the Schiacciata Romana at this Taman Desa delicatessen. La Spiga D’Oro, while staying true to their Italian roots, offers a variety of sandwiches delivered hot, fresh, and proudly homemade. With thin dough brushed with olive oil, schiacciata offers a lighter angle to your familiar grilled cheese. Across their three ranges, the Vegetariano sits within the non-pork selection. Schiacciata, spread with homemade pesto, is filled with fresh mozzarella over tomato rounds and crunchy lettuce leaves. It’s a stack that stays remarkably close to the classic. Meanwhile, the Prosciutto e Mozzarella from the Favourite selection features the schiacciata that opens on a herbaceous note of homemade pesto, giving way to thinly sliced jamón and mozzarella in every bite. If there’s ever an excuse to try this deli, let it be now. IG: @la_spiga_my Bricks & Bread KL Bricks & Bread might just be the melt your cheesy heart is looking for in Chow Kit. Behind its whitewashed exterior, the café blends Central American and Mediterranean influences with ease. Imagine an elegant canvas of a setting, brightened by house specialty sourdough pizzas, a sunlit alfresco patio set into a corner, and a gooey grilled cheese affair. There you have Bricks & Bread KL. Here, their grilled cheese truly comes into its own. Starting with the Grilled Cheese Sandwich, sweet caramelised onions sink into molten cheese—stretched over in-house sourdough, alongside sweet potato fries. A classic, only a little longer in its pull. For a richer bite, the BBQ Brisket Grilled Cheese takes it up a notch. Chipotle sourdough slides in, bracing the smoke of BBQ beef brisket, as caramelised onions bring sweetness with cheese tying the stack into one big beautiful bite. IG: @bricksandbread.kl Dough & Dolce Before steering into the second floor, a brilliant yellow door may strike up a visual pause—the unmistakable entrance to TTDI’s Dough & Dolce. Besides their baked items, pastas, pizzas, and patty melts, you’re set within a Mediterranean-led space, where rustic textures anchor the room with just enough green accents to lift it. Tearing into a classic grilled cheese in a setting like this would be hard to top. Luckily, one of the fan favourites is the Chipotle Grilled Cheese Sandwich with Tomato Soup. Not quite the toastie with a twist, but it’s comfort at its best. Because what could be better than a cheesy melt with tangy tomato soup, enjoyed on their balcony in the sun? Everything comes together on a homespun sourdough slice—talk about a heartwarming meal. IG: @doughanddolce Made at home Naturally, nothing brings it home quite like a homemade grilled cheese sandwich. Little effort, and a lot of love—it’s at home where a grilled cheese is outfitted for both a morning crunch or a midnight bite. The best bit? You can make it on your terms, anytime you like. Begin with your loaf: white, wholewheat, sourdough, or ciabatta, and then the cheese. While Chesdale and Kraft singles shouldn’t be dismissed, but for the perfect pull and that slow, molten melt, you’ll need a wedge. Less pre-sliced, more freshly grated. From here, the toppings and stuffings are yours to play with. Some cured ham here, lettuce leaves there, or even avocado chunks, because with a crunch like this, there are no rules. Classic if you want it, custom if you don’t.
